nasb.text: When all the leaders of the tower of Shechem heard of it, they entered the inner chamber of the temple of El-berith.

esv.text: When all the leaders of the Tower of Shechem heard of it, they entered the stronghold of the house of El-berith.

cnv.text: 示劍樓的眾人聽見了這事，就逃入伊勒．比利土廟的地穴裡。

ccb.text: 示剑楼的人听到风声，躲进了巴力·比利土神庙的内堂。
